title: The Final Voice (Part 4 of the LOUD Series)
speaker: Joy Cronje
summary: The sermon emphasizes that just as God's voice was the sole command for the Israelites' movement, His voice must be our "final voice" that directs our actions, speech, and decisions. We are challenged to consider whose voice is truly coming out of our mouths and to ensure we do not move, speak, or act until we have heard from God.
quotes: The thing that no one warned you about is you are the final voice in someone's life.
When I open my mouth, whose voice is coming out?
We will not move. We will not speak. We will not act until we have heard from the mouth of God.
